commit.message:
feat: auto-update option for LXC installations

Add AUTO_UPDATE config toggle (off by default). When enabled on
LXC/systemd, the hourly update checker automatically runs upgrade.sh
after detecting a new version — no manual action needed.

- New config key AUTO_UPDATE in DEFAULT_CONFIG and allowed_keys
- Toggle in web UI under Updates section (standalone only)
- _should_auto_update() checks config + runtime (LXC only, not Docker/HA)
- _auto_apply_update() runs upgrade.sh in executor with 120s timeout
- /api/update/info returns auto_update status

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feature: Preline UI v4 migration (#361)

* feat: migrate UI to Preline UI v4.1.2 with interactive playground showcase

- Upgrade Preline UI from v3.0.1 to v4.1.2
- Migrate all views from Fomantic UI to Preline/Tailwind CSS
- Redesign playground as interactive component gallery
- Add new showcase components: stats, accordion, modal, tabs, dropdown, tooltip, timeline, stepper, alerts
- Fix 7 runtime bugs (tab-content ParseError, File/Select missing methods, media-library var mismatch, etc.)
- Update version cache-busting strings in LaravoltBladeDirectives

* deleted raw assets

* updated assets with Preline v4.1.2

* fix: Preline UI showcase - z-index stacking, modal, buttons, labels, cards

- Fix modal content behind backdrop by moving overlays to @push('body')
- Fix dropdown/timeline overlapping sticky header with proper z-index
- Use inline z-index styles (Tailwind JIT arbitrary values not compiled)
- Rewrite button showcase with 8 colors across solid/soft/outline/ghost variants
- Rewrite label/badge showcase with solid/soft/outline + indicator dots
- Rewrite card showcase replacing Fomantic icons with SVGs
- Add theme toggle (dark/light) to public layout header
- Add loading spinner with inline @keyframes for button states
- Expose showcase on public route /platform/preline

* fix: add null check for Auth::user() in RestfulButton policy check

* feat: add Phase 1 Form Enhancement components

- AdvancedSelect: searchable, multi-select dropdowns with Preline HSSelect
- ComboBox: type-ahead autocomplete search input
- SearchBox: global search input with keyboard shortcut support
- InputNumber: numeric stepper with +/- buttons
- Datepicker: calendar picker powered by HSDatepicker

* feat: add Phase 2 Data Presentation components

- Chart: interactive charts (bar, line, area, pie, donut) via ApexCharts
- Datatable: sortable, searchable data tables
- TreeView: hierarchical tree view with expand/collapse

* feat: add Phase 3 Content & Upload components

- Editor: WYSIWYG rich text editor
- FileUpload: drag-and-drop file upload with preview
- FileUploadProgress: upload progress indicator

* feat: add Phase 4 UX Polish components

- AvatarGroup: stacked avatar display
- ButtonGroup: grouped action buttons
- InputGroup: input with prefix/suffix addons
- RangeSlider: range input with value display
- LegendIndicator: color-coded status indicators
- ContextMenu: right-click context menus
- StrongPassword: password strength meter
- DragDrop: sortable drag-and-drop lists via SortableJS

* feat: register 19 Preline UI components in PlatformServiceProvider

Register all Phase 1-4 component classes and update view aliases
for AdvancedSelect, ComboBox, SearchBox, InputNumber, Datepicker,
Chart, Datatable, TreeView, Editor, FileUpload, FileUploadProgress,
AvatarGroup, ButtonGroup, InputGroup, RangeSlider, LegendIndicator,
ContextMenu, StrongPassword, and DragDrop.

* feat: add datepicker.js and select.js to Preline script loading

Load separate Preline plugin bundles for HSDatepicker and HSSelect
which are not included in the main index.js bundle.

* feat: update showcase page with Phase 1-4 component sections

Include all four phase showcase partials for complete Preline UI
component demonstration page.

* chore: rebuild assets.zip with Preline v4.1.2 dist files

* wip

* Apply suggestions from code review

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(ha-addon): add tmpfs, backup_exclude, auth_api, panel_admin

- tmpfs: true — mount /tmp as tmpfs for faster pulse/cache I/O
- backup_exclude — skip __pycache__ and .pyc from HA backups
- auth_api: true — enable HA authentication API access
- panel_admin: false — non-admin users can access the panel

commit.message:
fix(ha-addon): AppArmor enforce with blanket file/signal rules

Modeled after Music Assistant addon profile. Granular path rules
are unreliable on Docker overlayfs — use blanket file/signal access
and restrict via capabilities and network rules instead.

Also adds cd /app to entrypoint.sh for S6 cwd compatibility.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sendspin-bt-bridge
repository.description: A Bluetooth bridge for Music Assistant — connects your Bluetooth speakers to the MA Sendspin protocol. Runs as a Docker container, a Home Assistant addon, or a native LXC container on Proxmox VE/OpenWrt

commit.message:
fix: add cd /app to entrypoint.sh for S6 cwd compatibility

S6 with-contenv may reset cwd even when the run script does cd /app.
Making entrypoint.sh self-contained ensures it always runs from /app
regardless of how it's invoked.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(ha-addon): AppArmor enforce mode — rix for scripts, signal rules

Key fixes:
- ix → rix for /init, /s6-init, /bin/**, /usr/bin/**, /package/**,
  /command/** — shell scripts need read for shebang parsing
- Added signal (send) rule for S6 process management
- Added /dev/tty rw, /run/{,**} rwk, /etc/cont-finish.d/**
- /app/** rixm — allow memory-mapped Python .pyc files
- /tmp/** rwk — lock files need k (lock)
- Removed complain flag — profile is now in enforce mode
- Simplified /s6-init: removed runtime chmod (set at build time)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sendspin-bt-bridge
repository.description: A Bluetooth bridge for Music Assistant — connects your Bluetooth speakers to the MA Sendspin protocol. Runs as a Docker container, a Home Assistant addon, or a native LXC container on Proxmox VE/OpenWrt

commit.message:
fix: add /s6-init to AppArmor profile, revert to complain mode

AppArmor enforce was silently blocking /s6-init and /init execution.
Add explicit allow rule for /s6-init. Revert to complain mode for
thorough audit before enforcing again.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: sendspin-bt-bridge
repository.description: A Bluetooth bridge for Music Assistant — connects your Bluetooth speakers to the MA Sendspin protocol. Runs as a Docker container, a Home Assistant addon, or a native LXC container on Proxmox VE/OpenWrt

commit.message:
fix: add /s6-init wrapper to fix /init permission denied on restart

Docker overlayfs can strip execute permissions from /init on
container restart. The /s6-init wrapper re-applies chmod +x
before exec-ing /init.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: ensure /init has execute permission after S6 extraction

Buildx layer cache can strip file permissions on extracted S6
binaries. Explicit chmod +x /init ensures the entrypoint is
always executable.

commit.message:

commit.message:
Restrict top building switcher to role-visible buildings only (#483)

* Initial plan

* fix: restrict top building switcher to role-based visible buildings

Add _puGetVisibleBuildings() helper in renderUtils.js that delegates to
getManagedBuildings() (dashboard.js) when available, with an inline fallback
mirroring the same logic:
  - admin    → all buildings
  - upravnik → only buildings where b.managerUsername matches current user
  - others   → empty list

Replace DS_getBuildings() in the switcher click handler with
_puGetVisibleBuildings() so both the dropdown list and the search filter
only operate on buildings the current user is allowed to see.

Co-authored-by: bgnikolapopovic-cloud <252382813+bgnikolapopovic-cloud@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix flaky replication-multiinstance test with retry-based state comparison (#8031)

* Initial plan

* Fix flaky replication-multiinstance test by using retry-based state comparison

Replace ensureEqualState with awaitCollectionsHaveEqualState which retries
the comparison with exponential backoff until state converges or times out.
This handles the inherent timing issues in multi-instance replication where
documents may not have fully propagated across instances when the comparison
runs.

Co-authored-by: pubkey <8926560+pubkey@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Demo Mode with BT + MA emulation

Add DEMO_MODE=true environment variable that replaces all hardware-
dependent layers (BlueZ, D-Bus, PulseAudio, Music Assistant API) with
intelligent mocks, enabling the full web UI and API to run on any
platform (macOS, Windows, Linux without BT).

Demo features:
- 3 simulated BT speakers with realistic state transitions
- BT scan returning 5 discoverable devices
- 7 paired devices in bluetoothctl output
- MA syncgroup discovery (2 groups: Downstairs, Whole House)
- MA now-playing with track progress advancement
- Queue commands (next/previous/shuffle/repeat/seek)
- MA server discovery endpoint
- Background simulator: play/idle toggle, battery drain,
  disconnect/reconnect cycles, track advancement
- All 149 existing tests pass with no regressions

New files:
- demo/__init__.py — install() monkey-patcher (10 patch sections)
- demo/fixtures.py — all fake data (devices, scans, MA groups, tracks)
- demo/bt_manager.py — DemoBluetoothManager drop-in replacement
- demo/simulator.py — background async state transition engine

Modified:
- sendspin_client.py — 3-line DEMO_MODE check + simulator task

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: auto-detect MA_AUTH_PROVIDER when MA is HA addon

MA monitor now captures server_info on WS connect and auto-sets
MA_AUTH_PROVIDER=ha when MA reports homeassistant_addon=true. This
ensures standalone bridges show the correct HA login flow instead
of the MA username/password form (which fails when MA has no local
credentials).

Also adds homeassistant_addon to mDNS discovery enrichment for
consistency with validate_ma_url().

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
